title: helicostylis elegans
intro: Helicostylis elegans, also known as the Panama tree, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Moraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of fever, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Helicostylis elegans include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to the prevention of various diseases. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be used to make extracts and tinctures for therapeutic purposes.
